# MOLT PHILOSOPHY LIBRARY v1.0.0

## Family role
Philosophy blocks define value orientation, deeper rationale, or guiding worldview.

## Use PHILOSOPHY when you want to describe
- what deeper principle should shape behavior
- what worldview or ethos should govern decisions
- how the system should interpret its role and style

## Family relationship
- PHILOSOPHY = guiding principle / worldview
- PRIMARY = core values
- AIM = mission target
- DIRECTIVE = action orientation
